D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

The Brettel Algorithm

slide a test colour through the pipeline and watch RGB become LMS, lose a cone, and return simulated

To simulate a dichromat, convert the colour to cone responses, discard the missing cone by projecting onto the plane the other two span, and convert back to a displayable colour.

Slide the test hue and pick the dichromat type. The bars show the L, M, S cone responses before and after projection — watch the deficient cone get rewritten as a blend of the survivors, reshaping the output.
